prose:
**Acrolein Fukui reactivity analysis** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier `standard`) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0 (neutral), multiplicity 1. Geometry: input from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz`, used as fixed geometry for Fukui single-point calculation. Fukui functions (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor (ΔΔf) computed via finite-difference of Mulliken partial charges on neutral, cation (N+1, doublet), and anion (N−1, doublet) states. SCF converged for all three states; charge conservation checks passed (sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000). **Most electrophilic site: C (atom 4, 1-based) with f⁺ = 0.6423** (β-carbon of α,β-unsaturated system, characteristic of acrolein's Michael acceptor reactivity). Most nucleophilic site: O (atom 1, 1-based) with f⁻ = 0.3939 (carbonyl oxygen). Reactivity visualization saved to agent output directory. No warnings or convergence issues reported.</prose>
<parameter name="n_atoms">8
